CustomField.description: @author David Wood. Overlay for the platform-readonly AccountContactRelation.IsDirect. True when this Contact has at least one indirect ACR (IsDirect=false). Maintained by the AccountContactRelation_Set_Is_Consultant flow. Read by engagement-routing Apex (Q11).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-maintained. True when the contact is related to any account as a consultant (indirect ACR).
CustomField.label: Is Consultant
